---
title: "MIMIC_DS_CODE"
author: "Mian Xie"
date: "2026-03-20"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

mimic <- read.csv("~/mimic_final.csv")
head(mimic)

mimic <- mimic %>%
  mutate(
    obese = as.integer(obese),
    mortality = as.integer(mortality),
    age_group = factor(age_group, levels = c("<40", "40-64", "65+")),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("F", "M")),
    severity_group = factor(severity_group, levels = c("Low", "Medium", "High")),
    icu_type_final = factor(icu_type_final)
  )

str(mimic)
summary(mimic)


table1_counts <- mimic %>%
  group_by(obese) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mortality_rate = mean(mortality),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

table1_age <- prop.table(table(mimic$obese, mimic$age_group), margin = 1)
table1_sex <- prop.table(table(mimic$obese, mimic$sex), margin = 1)
table1_severity <- prop.table(table(mimic$obese, mimic$severity_group), margin = 1)
table1_icu <- prop.table(table(mimic$obese, mimic$icu_type_final), margin = 1)

table1_counts
table1_age
table1_sex
table1_severity
table1_icu
```


```{r}
fit_age <- glm(
  mortality ~ obese * age_group + sex + severity_group + icu_type_final,
  family = binomial(),
  data = mimic
)

summary(fit_age)

standardized_effects <- function(data, modifier, adjust_vars) {
  form <- as.formula(
    paste("mortality ~ obese *", modifier, "+", paste(adjust_vars, collapse = " + "))
  )
  
  fit <- glm(form, family = binomial(), data = data)
  
  levs <- levels(data[[modifier]])
  out_list <- vector("list", length(levs))
  
  for (i in seq_along(levs)) {
    v <- levs[i]
    subdata <- data[data[[modifier]] == v, , drop = FALSE]
    
    d1 <- subdata
    d0 <- subdata
    d1$obese <- 1
    d0$obese <- 0
    
    risk1 <- mean(predict(fit, newdata = d1, type = "response"))
    risk0 <- mean(predict(fit, newdata = d0, type = "response"))
    
    out_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
      modifier = modifier,
      level = v,
      risk_obese_1 = risk1,
      risk_obese_0 = risk0,
      risk_diff = risk1 - risk0
    )
  }
  
  do.call(rbind, out_list)
}


bootstrap_standardized_effects <- function(data, modifier, adjust_vars, B = 200, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  
  base_res <- standardized_effects(data, modifier, adjust_vars)
  levs <- base_res$level
  
  boot_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = B, ncol = length(levs))
  colnames(boot_mat) <- levs
  
  n <- nrow(data)
  
  for (b in 1:B) {
    idx <- sample(seq_len(n), size = n, replace = TRUE)
    boot_data <- data[idx, , drop = FALSE]
    
    tmp <- try(
      standardized_effects(boot_data, modifier, adjust_vars),
      silent = TRUE
    )
    
    if (!inherits(tmp, "try-error")) {
      boot_mat[b, ] <- tmp$risk_diff
    }
  }
  
  ci_low <- apply(boot_mat, 2, quantile, probs = 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)
  ci_high <- apply(boot_mat, 2, quantile, probs = 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  base_res$ci_low <- ci_low[base_res$level]
  base_res$ci_high <- ci_high[base_res$level]
  
  base_res
}


results_age <- bootstrap_standardized_effects(
  data = mimic,
  modifier = "age_group",
  adjust_vars = c("sex", "severity_group", "icu_type_final"),
  B = 200
)

results_sex <- bootstrap_standardized_effects(
  data = mimic,
  modifier = "sex",
  adjust_vars = c("age_group", "severity_group", "icu_type_final"),
  B = 200
)

results_severity <- bootstrap_standardized_effects(
  data = mimic,
  modifier = "severity_group",
  adjust_vars = c("age_group", "sex", "icu_type_final"),
  B = 200
)

results_icu <- bootstrap_standardized_effects(
  data = mimic,
  modifier = "icu_type_final",
  adjust_vars = c("age_group", "sex", "severity_group"),
  B = 200
)
all_results <- bind_rows(
  results_age,
  results_sex,
  results_severity,
  results_icu
)

all_results

all_results$label <- paste(all_results$modifier, all_results$level, sep = ": ")

ggplot(all_results, aes(x = risk_diff, y = reorder(label, risk_diff))) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_low, xmax = ci_high), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Subgroup-specific adjusted risk differences",
    x = "Adjusted risk difference",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
